browse_douyin.description: 打开抖音浏览N个视频并随机点赞
browse_douyin.buildActions: function(rounds) { const actions = [{ type: 'launch', package: 'com.ss.android.ugc.aweme' }, { type: 'wait', ms: 4000 }]; for (let i = 0; i < rounds; i++) { const watchMs = 2000 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 3000); const shouldLike = Math.random() > 0.4; actions.push({ type: 'wait', ms: watchMs }); if (shouldLike) { const likeY = 1100 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 300); actions.push({ type: 'tap', x: 960, y: likeY }); actions.push({ type: 'wait', ms: 300 }); } if (i < rounds - 1) { actions.push({ type: 'swipe', x1: 540, y1: 1800, x2: 540, y2: 400, duration: 400 }); actions.push({ type: 'wait', ms: 1500 }); } } actions.push({ type: 'home' }); return actions; }

browse_kuaishou.description: 打开快手浏览N个视频并随机点赞
browse_kuaishou.buildActions: function(rounds) { const actions = [{ type: 'launch', package: 'com.kuaishou.nebula' }, { type: 'wait', ms: 4000 }]; for (let i = 0; i < rounds; i++) { const watchMs = 2000 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 3000); const shouldLike = Math.random() > 0.4; actions.push({ type: 'wait', ms: watchMs }); if (shouldLike) { actions.push({ type: 'tap', x: 960, y: 1200 }); actions.push({ type: 'wait', ms: 300 }); } if (i < rounds - 1) { actions.push({ type: 'swipe', x1: 540, y1: 1800, x2: 540, y2: 400, duration: 400 }); actions.push({ type: 'wait', ms: 1500 }); } } actions.push({ type: 'home' }); return actions; }
